title: Twilight's Flavor & Delight
description: This mod adds food and desserts from Twilight Forest in Farmer's Delight and Neapolitan style.
body:
# Twilight's Flavors and Delight ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d6cSefpO/images/b5354fd4721794dac4b88d5429d8ec3b2ed67376.png) This mod is a port of [Twilight Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilightdelight) and [Twilight Delight Frozen Pride](https://modrinth.com/mod/tdfp) to 1.19.2. This port fixed all unaddressed known issues, improved user interaction feedback, and adds Create Central Kitchen support. ### Required Dependency: - [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) (CurseForge only) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) ### Optional Dependency / Crossover: - [Neapolitan](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/neapolitan) (CurseForge only) - [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) - [Create Central Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-central-kitchen) ![](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/d6cSefpO/images/1fd76e6f5ffd570d2af85b627467723ec94f9454.png) ## Content - 4 knifes with Twilight Forest material and unique abilities - Maze Stove and Fiery Pot that accelerates cooking for food in Twilight Forest or this mod - 35 kinds of food in the style of Farmer's Delight - 19 kinds of food in the style of Neapolitan - 5 potion effects that helps player to explore the world and assist combat - Ways to craft/cook Twilight Forest food that was uncraftable in Twilight Forest - Dismantle unwanted trophies from Twilight Forest to get extra precious loot - A sword that makes enemy cry
## Potion Effects: - Fire Range: ignite surrounding enemies, and protect player from being ignited (still take fire damage from other sources, such as fire on ground and lava) - Frozen Range: freeze surrounding enemies by inflicting Frosty V, and protect player from Frosty Effect. - Poison Range: poison surrounding enemies with much faster damage rate. Protect player from Poison Effect. - Temporal Sadness: harmful effect that makes the entity lose attack strength and movement speed. - Aurora Glowing: make all entities you see have a rainbow glowing outline that goes through wall. Helpful to find enemies behind walls or items left behind.  ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d6cSefpO/images/f8e0e4d23a87fe54c5b04e47c79cfa9bba974724.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/d6cSefpO/images/e0d607a7bde806d532243bf66e17464cefa785ef.png)
